title: Quest 35189 Filter Coffee Machine/Portable Travel Filter Coffee Maker / 420ml Capacity/Thermal Travel Mug Included/Works with Ground Coffee & Coffee Pods/Instant Espresso & More
features: FILTER COFFEE MAKER – Treat yourself to fresh heated coffee with this Coffee Maker from Quest, equipped with a permanent filter! This machine will save you from needing to use paper filters any time you fancy a brew, saving you money, as well as reducing waste from non-reusable filters.

COMPACT & PORTABLE – Measuring just 25 x 18 x 13cm, the coffee maker is easy to store and take with you when you’re out and about! Use it in the morning in the kitchen, or later in the afternoon when you need a boost in the office, as it will easily fit in a bag and then on a countertop. Even though it’s compact, it still stores 420ml of coffee, enough to fill up your cup whenever you need it.

ALL KINDS OF COFFEE – Whether you prefer espresso, macchiato, or any other kinds of coffee, this machine is ideal for making them in an instant! It can use ground coffee or soft coffee pods when brewing – whichever you prefer. Once you start brewing, the water level indicator can also show you just how much is in the machine.

TRAVEL MUG INCLUDED – When you want to get out and about, you can take your fresh coffee with you using the travel mug provided! Its size allows it to easily fit in a car’s cup holder, making it convenient for when you’re on your way to work. The mug’s thermal properties will ensure that the coffee inside retains its heat, so it’ll taste just like a fresh cup even after transport.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Compact Size Measuring just 25 x 18 x 13cm, the coffee maker is easily stored and also portable. Permanent Reusable Filter The built-in coffee filter can be reused without a need to repeatedly buy new filters. Ground Coffee or Pods This coffee machine works with both ground coffee or coffee pods/bags - whichever you prefer. Portable Cup Included The insulated travel mug conveniently allows you to take freshly brewed coffee out with you. Easy Operation Using this machine is easy - just add water, ground coffee or pods, position the mug and press on. Next page 1 Compact Size 2 Permanent Reusable Filter 3 Ground Coffee or Pods 4 Portable Cup Included 5 Easy Operation
